requests.prompt: A cute small kawaii robot character design, pixel art style, Gameboy retro game aesthetic, 16-bit color palette, clean pixel lines, white background, front view, standing pose, soft pastel colors with lavender and pink and cyan accents, oversized head with big eyes, antenna with glowing tip, chubby round body, simple smile, no animations, single static pose, isolated on pure white, sprite sheet style center, high contrast, Game Boy Advance inspired
